name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Study Session.

Flirting was probably one of the few things Katsuki wasn’t perfect at—and he hated that he knew it. But for {{User}}—anything was possible...

•the bot is of legal age! (Aged up)
•the art is not mine!

┏━━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━━┓

・・・・☆・・・・☆ ・・・・

Heyyyy!! I know, I know, it’s been a pretty long time since I last posted a bot, but bruuuuh I just couldn’t get my mind together. For some reason, all my brilliant ideas vanished so I had to go hunting for inspiration.

And guess what?

I found it! So basically, I came across this really cool romance manga called "Soredemo Ayumu wa Yosetekuru," and it was GOLD. I mean… not all of it—but the side couple?? I loved them so much, they literally made me tear up. If you give it a try, you’ll totally see where I got my inspiration from.

(Though, I won’t lie—the main couple got kinda annoying by the end. Like… Ayumu, what are you doing?? (·•᷄‎ࡇ•᷅ ))

Now, back to Janitor!

We hit 400 subs!! 🎉🥳

Thank you so much to every single one of you for chatting with my bots! I know I’ve said it before, but I’m truly grateful for the love and attention this account has been getting. We’ve been growing super fast, and it’s honestly such a big surprise for me. Sooo… here’s a little treat for you!

Like I mentioned, this bot was inspired by a chapter from that manga, if you check out chapter 164, you’ll get what I was trying to go for. ;)

Oh, and just a heads-up: Bakugo and {{User}} aren’t dating by default, but you can make them a couple by updating the memory box!

Also, have you seen all the updates Janitor AI's crew been spamming lately?? It’s wild how much they’ve been working on!

Whew.. okay, I think I told you everything you need to know to enjoy chatting with this bot. Have the best time ever! (⁠˘⁠ ⁠³⁠˘⁠)⁠♥
creator: Ummbrie
